hero.title: Aeternyx
hero.subtitle: A single capsule. Ten bioactives. Five aging pathways. Engineered by physicians for the next 100 years of you.

product.title: One capsule. The architecture of cellular longevity.
product.description: Aeternyx™ is a clinical-grade longevity formulation that converges ten evidence-graded molecules across the five hallmarks of aging — mitochondrial decline, oxidative stress, inflammaging, vascular calcification, and micronutrient deficiency. Each dose is mapped to a published human RCT.

ingredientsSection.title: Ten molecules. Mapped to RCT-grade dosing.
ingredientsSection.subtitle: Every ingredient is dosed to mirror the human clinical trial that validated its mechanism — not the bottom of the supplement market.

items.name: Coenzyme Q10
items.description: Mitochondrial ATP synthesis; matches Q-SYMBIO and KiSel-10 RCT dosing. Rate-limiting cofactor for cellular energy production.

items.name: Trans-Resveratrol
items.description: SIRT1 activator and NF-κB inflammaging suppressor. Matched to Witte 2014 cognitive RCT dose.

items.name: Alpha-Lipoic Acid
items.description: Universal antioxidant (water + lipid soluble). Regenerates Vitamins C and E. Matches ALADIN/SYDNEY 2 neuroprotection dose range.

items.name: Astaxanthin
items.description: 6,000× stronger than Vitamin C. Crosses blood-brain and blood-retina barriers. Suppresses NF-κB. Strongest carotenoid antioxidant known.

items.name: Lycopene
items.description: Lipid peroxidation chain terminator. Cardioprotective at 10mg (PREDIMED alignment). Completes carotenoid antioxidant spectrum with Astaxanthin.

items.name: Selenium (L-Selenomethionine)
items.description: Rate-limiting cofactor for GPx1–GPx5 enzymatic antioxidant cascade. KiSel-10 partner molecule. Addresses India's selenium-deficient soil gap.

items.name: Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid)
items.description: Recycles oxidised Vitamin E and glutathione. Collagen synthesis co-factor. Foundational antioxidant network anchor.

items.name: Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol)
items.description: Addresses 80%+ urban Indian deficiency. Immunomodulator, anti-inflammatory, cardiovascular and bone health.

items.name: Vitamin K2-7 (MK-7)
items.description: Directs calcium to bone not arteries. Prevents calcium paradox risk in D3 users. Essential D3 partner molecule.

items.name: Zinc (Zinc Bisglycinate)
items.description: Antioxidant enzyme cofactor (SOD). Immune defence, wound healing, testosterone maintenance. Chelated form for maximum bioavailability.

science.title: Five aging pathways. One convergent intervention.
science.subtitle: Aging is not one process. It is the cumulative failure of mitochondria, redox balance, signalling, calcium homeostasis, and micronutrient status. Aeternyx™ addresses all five at once.

pathways.name: Mitochondrial Decline
pathways.detail: CoQ10 + ALA restore ATP synthesis efficiency lost from age 30 onward.

pathways.name: Oxidative Stress
pathways.detail: Astaxanthin, Lycopene, Vitamin C and Selenium-GPx form a layered ROS defence.

pathways.name: Inflammaging
pathways.detail: Resveratrol-driven SIRT1 activation and NF-κB suppression at the gene level.

pathways.name: Vascular Calcification
pathways.detail: K2-7 directs calcium away from arterial walls, partnered with D3.

pathways.name: Micronutrient Deficiency
pathways.detail: D3, Zinc and Selenium correct India-specific population-level deficits.

philosophy.quote: We did not build Aeternyx to be a supplement. We built it to be the molecular floor on which a longer life is constructed — every dose mapped to a randomised trial, every molecule earning its place. Cellular intelligence is not a marketing phrase. It is the standard.

prescription.title: A formulation your patients can take alongside their prescription.
prescription.subtitle: Aeternyx™ is built to integrate with mainstream clinical practice. No proprietary blends, no megadosing, no interactions outside the published literature. Specialists who recommend Aeternyx™ include:

posts.title: Why we dose CoQ10 at 100mg, not 30mg
posts.excerpt: The Q-SYMBIO and KiSel-10 trials defined the floor for clinical effect. Anything less is theatre.
posts.body:
Most CoQ10 supplements in the Indian market contain 30mg or less. This is not a clinical dose — it is a marketing dose.

The Q-SYMBIO trial (Mortensen et al., 2014) randomised 420 patients with chronic heart failure to 300mg of CoQ10 daily or placebo. After two years, all-cause mortality fell 42%. The follow-up KiSel-10 trial in healthy elderly Swedes used 200mg of CoQ10 plus 200mcg of selenium daily for four years, and reduced cardiovascular mortality by 53%.

At 100mg, Aeternyx™ sits at the floor of clinical effect — the dose at which serum CoQ10 reliably rises above the deficiency threshold in adults over 40 — paired with 55mcg of selenium to complete the KiSel-10 synergy. Anything less is below the line at which the molecule does anything measurable in the literature.

posts.title: The calcium paradox — why D3 needs K2
posts.excerpt: Unaccompanied Vitamin D3 supplementation can deposit calcium where it does the most harm. K2-7 is non-negotiable.
posts.body:
Vitamin D3 raises serum calcium. That calcium has to go somewhere. In a K2-replete body, osteocalcin (a K2-dependent protein) carboxylates and routes the calcium into bone, where it is wanted. In a K2-deficient body, that same calcium drifts into arterial walls — where it is the substrate for atherosclerotic plaque calcification.

This is the calcium paradox, and it is the reason high-dose D3 supplementation without K2 has been associated with elevated coronary calcification scores in several observational cohorts.

Aeternyx™ pairs every 2000 IU of D3 with 100mcg of K2-7 (the MK-7 isoform, which has a 72-hour half-life versus MK-4's 8 hours). The molecules are not interchangeable. They are partners, and we will not ship D3 without K2.

posts.title: Astaxanthin: the only carotenoid that crosses the BBB
posts.excerpt: Why one tiny molecule from microalgae outperforms most cognitive supplements on the market.
posts.body:
Astaxanthin is the carotenoid that gives salmon and flamingos their colour. It is also the only carotenoid known to cross both the blood-brain barrier and the blood-retina barrier in measurable concentrations.

Its antioxidant capacity is approximately 6,000× that of Vitamin C and 100× that of Vitamin E in vitro. It also suppresses NF-κB, the master inflammatory transcription factor, and stabilises the mitochondrial inner membrane against oxidative leak.

In the cognition literature, 4–12mg of astaxanthin per day has been associated with improvements in working memory, reaction time, and macular pigment optical density. Aeternyx™ includes 4mg — the floor of efficacy, dosed for daily sustainable use rather than acute studies.

hero.title: We are Arata Nutraceuticals.
hero.subtitle: A physician-led longevity laboratory based in Hyderabad, building India's most clinically literate supplement portfolio. Aeternyx™ is our founding formulation.

story.title: Why we exist
paragraphs: Arata Nutraceuticals was founded on a single conviction: the supplement industry in India had drifted dangerously far from the clinical literature. Bottles claimed everything; trials supported almost nothing. Doses were marketing artefacts. Excipients outweighed actives.

We work backwards from the randomised trial. Every molecule in every Arata product is included because a peer-reviewed human RCT proved it does something measurable. Every dose matches the trial that earned it. Anything that cannot survive that test is not in the capsule.
Aeternyx™ is the first of a planned portfolio of physician-formulated protocols, each engineered for a specific axis of healthspan — and each held to the same standard.
